members.label: picture frame
members.description: framed artwork/photos along the staircase wall
members.long_form_open_description: Several framed photographs or art pieces hung in a vertical sequence on the wall beside the staircase. Frames are dark or black and contrast with the beige wall; decorative arrangement follows the stair angle.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Arrayed along the left stair wall above the couch
